docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $80.00 SERVED OCT-04-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BALL, COLIN C/O GARTNER INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,813.00 FILED BY FREY, DORIS AS TO DEFENDANT BALL, COLIN C/O GARTNER INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF COLIN BALL RE: CORRECT ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT BALL, COLIN C/O GARTNER INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FREY, DORIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALL, COLIN C/O GARTNER INC. $2,813.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,943.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-30-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-30-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DORIS FREY WITH WITNESS: COLIN SMILIE (PROPERTY MANAGER). APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT COLIN BALL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2016 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT HAS BEEN FULLY PAID OR SATISFIED AS TO ALL JUDGMENT DEBTORS. AS TO DEFENDANT BALL, COLIN C/O GARTNER INC.
